Bash(/c/Workspace/Vibe/Dashboard/.claude/skills/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sys
content = open\('/c/Workspace/Vibe/Dashboard/plans/260320-1646-integrations-page/plan.md'\).read\(\)
print\('plan.md size:', len\(content\)\)
")

Bash(printf '%s\\n' "" "## Implementation Steps" "" "1. **Create services/integration-store.js**" "   - IIFE pattern; window.IntegrationStore = IntegrationStore at bottom." "   - var LS_KEY = vibe-integrations and var _data = {}" "   - init\(\): JSON.parse from localStorage into _data; try/catch." "   - _persist\(\): JSON.stringify _data to localStorage; try/catch." "   - save\(provider, tokenData\): assign and _persist\(\)." "   - get\(provider\): return _data[provider] || null." "   - list\(\): Object.keys\(_data\).map\(function\(k\){ return _data[k]; }\)" "   - remove\(provider\): delete _data[provider]; _persist\(\)." "   - Target: ~45 lines." "" "2. **index.html -- add IntegrationStore script tag**" "   - In services section after layout-store.js:" "   - <script src=""services/integration-store.js""></script>" "" "3. **app.js -- call IntegrationStore.init\(\)**" "   - In _init\(\), after DatasetStore.init\(\):" "   - if \(window.IntegrationStore\) IntegrationStore.init\(\);" "" "4. **page-integrations.js -- add Client ID input card**" "   - Above provider cards, render a card with label, input id=intg-client-id, helper text." "   - On render\(\): populate from localStorage.getItem\(vibe-gis-client-id\) or empty string." "   - Bind change/blur on input: localStorage.setItem\(vibe-gis-client-id, val\)." "" "5. **page-integrations.js -- replace _handleConnect with GIS flow**" "   - Read Client ID from localStorage.getItem\(vibe-gis-client-id\)." "   - If empty: Toast.error and return." "   - Guard: if no window.google, inject GIS script tag with onload; else call _initGisAndConnect\(\) directly." "   - _initGisAndConnect\(\):" "     - google.accounts.oauth2.initTokenClient\({ client_id, scope, callback }\)" "     - scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets.readonly" "     - callback: on error Toast.error; on success IntegrationStore.save\(\) then _updateCardState\(\)" "     - tokenClient.requestAccessToken\(\)" "   - Token shape: { provider, accessToken: resp.access_token, expiresAt: Date.now\(\) + \(resp.expires_in * 1000\), email: empty }" "" "6. **page-integrations.js -- _updateCardState\(provider, state\)**" "   - connected: add .is-connected class to card, button text Disconnect, swap click handler." "   - disconnected: remove .is-connected, button text Connect, restore original handler." "   - Called on render\(\) to restore persisted state from IntegrationStore." "" "7. **page-integrations.js -- _handleDisconnect\(provider\)**" "   - IntegrationStore.remove\(provider\), _updateCardState\(provider, disconnected\), Toast.info." "" "8. **Expiry check on render\(\)**" "   - For each entry in IntegrationStore.list\(\):" "   - If entry.expiresAt < Date.now\(\): show Reconnect badge on card." "   - Else: _updateCardState\(provider, connected\).")

Bash(printf '%s\\n' "" "## Implementation Steps" "" "1. **dataset-source-integration.js -- update _providers array**" "   - Remove excel-online entry \(never had real implementation; YAGNI\)." "   - Keep google-sheets, google-drive, powerbi, tableau." "   - Add active flag: google-sheets is active: true; others active: false." "" "2. **dataset-source-integration.js -- update render\($container\)**" "   - At top of render\(\), read connected providers: var connected = window.IntegrationStore ? IntegrationStore.list\(\) : [];" "   - Build a lookup map: var connectedMap = {}; connected.forEach\(function\(e\){ connectedMap[e.provider] = e; }\)" "   - For google-sheets:" "     - If connectedMap[google-sheets] exists AND entry.expiresAt > Date.now\(\):" "       - Render connected card: provider icon/name, green Connected badge, Spreadsheet URL input \(id=intg-sheet-url\), Range input \(id=intg-sheet-range, default A1:Z1000\), Load Data button \(id=btn-load-sheet\)." "     - Else if connectedMap[google-sheets] exists but expired:" "       - Render expired card: warning badge Token expired, link: Connect in Integrations page." "     - Else \(not connected\):" "       - Render not-connected card: lock icon, text Not connected, link to #integrations." "   - For other providers \(google-drive, powerbi, tableau\):" "     - Render coming-soon stub card: dimmed, Coming Soon badge, disabled Connect button." "" "3. **dataset-source-integration.js -- bind Load button**" "   - $container.on\(click, #btn-load-sheet, function\(\) { _loadSheetData\(\); }\)" "   - _loadSheetData\(\):" "     - Read URL from #intg-sheet-url.val\(\); extract spreadsheetId \(regex or URL parsing\)." "     - Spreadsheet URL pattern: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/{SPREADSHEET_ID}/edit..." "     - Extract ID: url.match\(/\\/spreadsheets\\/d\\/\([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\)/\)" "     - Read range from #intg-sheet-range.val\(\) or default A1:Z1000." "     - Get token from IntegrationStore.get\(google-sheets\).accessToken." "     - Show loading state on button: btn.text\(Loading...\) btn.prop\(disabled, true\)." "     - XHR GET: https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/{id}/values/{range}" "     - Request header: Authorization: Bearer {accessToken}" "     - On success: parse response.values, convert to array of objects \(first row = headers\), store in _fetchedData, update status div, restore button." "     - On error: Toast.error with message, restore button." "" "4. **dataset-source-integration.js -- _parseSheetValues\(values\)**" "   - Extract: first row = header names, subsequent rows = data rows." "   - Return array of objects: values.slice\(1\).map\(function\(row\){ var obj = {}; headers.forEach\(function\(h,i\){ obj[h] = row[i] || ''''; }\); return obj; }\)" "   - Handle edge case: empty values array returns []." "" "5. **dataset-source-integration.js -- update getValue\(\)**" "   - If _fetchedData is non-empty: return { data: _fetchedData, meta: { type: integration, provider: google-sheets, status: connected } }" "   - If _selectedProvider set but no data loaded yet: return null \(user must click Load first\)." "   - Existing null-return-on-no-selection behavior preserved." "" "6. **dataset-source-integration.js -- update destroy\(\)**" "   - Reset _fetchedData = [] alongside existing cleanup." "   - $container.off\(\) as before." "" "7. **Intro text update**" "   - Change opening paragraph from static Select a service text to:" "   - If any providers connected: Connected providers shown below. Select Google Sheets and load data." "   - Else: No integrations connected. Go to the Integrations page to connect an account.")
Bash(.claude/skills/.venv/Scripts/python.exe .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "data pipeline builder tool dashboard SaaS" --design-system -p "Vibe Flow Builder")
